description: Baseline manifest-driven measurement workflow scaffold for OutSpread M1.

notes: The current reference-capture workflow is built around vst3_harness.
The current workflow only supports VST3 reference plugins.
Installed VST2 .dll plugins such as Eventide Blackhole.dll are not capturable through this workflow yet.

groups.name: smoke
groups.purpose: Basic render and lifecycle sanity checks.

groups.name: attack
groups.purpose: Attack, bloom, and early density behavior.

groups.name: tail
groups.purpose: Decay contour, density, and spectral evolution.

groups.name: gravity
groups.purpose: Bipolar Gravity behavior and reverse-like response.

groups.name: size
groups.purpose: Space scaling and size-related interaction behavior.

groups.name: tone_eq
groups.purpose: Low tone, high tone, and resonance behavior.

groups.name: modulation
groups.purpose: Modulation rate, depth, and movement behavior.

groups.name: width
groups.purpose: Stereo spread, decorrelation, and center stability.

groups.name: freeze_infinite
groups.purpose: Freeze and Infinite behavior, stability, and transitions.

groups.name: sample_rate_block_size
groups.purpose: Behavior consistency across supported execution settings.

groups.name: cpu_latency
groups.purpose: CPU cost, latency reporting, and multi-instance practicality.

parameterAssignment.rule: Use paramsByName by default. Use paramsByIndex only when harness compatibility requires it. Do not duplicate equivalent assignments in both fields.
